metadata.description: Single-plugin marketplace for the Athena Notes plugin — an Obsidian-native thinking and note-capture system.

plugins.name: athena-notes
plugins.description: Obsidian-native thinking and note-capture system. Hub-spoke of Claude Code agents (muse, scribe, archivist, sage, forge, and more) that captures your thinking into Obsidian vaults with zero setup friction.
